name: magclaw-team-sharing
description: Team Sharing skills for searching, reading, sharing, editing, and controlling MagClaw team context from agent sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Search, read, share, and manage MagClaw team context
interface.longDescription: Use MagClaw Team Sharing to connect projects, sync agent sessions through hooks, retrieve team discussions, read protected share/context links, publish artifacts, patch existing shares, and manage session reporting.
defaultPrompt: Search Team Sharing for yesterday's discussion.
Turn this summary into a Team Sharing link.
